descriptionRules.label: PR/Citizen requirement
descriptionRules.help: Excludes jobs that explicitly require citizenship, permanent residency, or equivalent local work-right status.

descriptionRules.label: Security clearance required
descriptionRules.help: Excludes jobs with hard security clearance requirements.

descriptionRules.label: No visa sponsorship
descriptionRules.help: Excludes jobs that explicitly say visa sponsorship is unavailable.

descriptionRules.label: Requires 4+ years experience
descriptionRules.help: Excludes only when the description states a minimum requirement of 4 or more years of experience.

descriptionRules.label: Requires 5+ years experience
descriptionRules.help: Excludes only when the description states a minimum requirement of 5 or more years of experience.
